title: cyathea praetermissa
intro: Cyathea praetermissa, also known as the False Kauri Fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cyathea praetermissa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Cyathea praetermissa is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and its extracts are used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
